body:
## Rationale
SoundLike guide pages (`/guides/how-to-sound-like-<drummer>`) teach you to replicate a drummer's sound. They already link to the drummer's profile, but they are **missing two high-value internal links**:
1. → `/drummers/<slug>/licks` (practice the actual licks) — **lick pages are proven organic performers**
2. → relevant album articles (`/articles/<slug>`) — **compound the editorial authority**

This is the reverse of #1357 (drummer profile → related articles). Guides → licks and guides → articles create a triangular link structure (profile ↔ guide ↔ article ↔ lick) that maximizes PageRank flow to all proven-organic surfaces.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js` — add `relatedArticles` and `licksUrl` fields to each guide entry
- `packages/frontend/App.js` or the guide renderer — render the cross-link section: 'Practice {name}'s signature licks →' and 'See {name}'s kit on {album} →'

## Link structure per guide
```javascript
// joey-jordison guide
relatedArticles: ['whats-in-joey-jordisons-kit', 'iowa-drum-setup', 'joey-jordison-drum-setup'],
licksUrl: '/drummers/joey-jordison/licks',  // if lick hub exists
```

## UI section (at bottom of guide page)
> **Go deeper:**  
> 🥁 [Practice Joey Jordison's Signature Licks →](/drummers/joey-jordison/licks)  
> 📖 [Joey Jordison's Complete Drum Kit →](/articles/whats-in-joey-jordisons-kit)

## Coverage
10 existing soundLike guides (joey-jordison, lars-ulrich, danny-carey, tomas-haake, dave-lombardo, mario-duplantier, gene-hoglan, brann-dailor, matt-halpern, chris-adler). All have lick pages. Most have ≥1 related article.

## Estimated organic uplift
Bidirectional PageRank flow between guide → lick hub → individual licks. Guide pages have structured content (good for rank) but currently orphaned from the lick surface. Compound effect mirrors #1357 and #1332 (article↔profile bidirectional).

## Verify
1. A soundLike guide page renders cross-links in HTML (not hidden by JS)
2. Link to /drummers/<slug>/licks is present and crawlable
3. ≥1 album article link present on each guide
4. No regression on guide page layout
5. Internal links appear in site crawl (Screaming Frog or curl)

## Done
PR merged adding cross-links to soundLikeGuides.js data and rendering them on guide pages.
title: SEO: SoundLike guide pages — add bidirectional cross-links to lick pages + album articles
